Reviews

The most authentic Korean taste I have tried in Berlin so far (as a person who has lived in Seoul for the last 12 years). 진짜 진짜 맛있어요 💖 We ordered the Bul-Galbi (불갈비) and Perilla Mushroom Soup (들깨버섯탕) and it tasted just like in Korea! The meat had a smoky taste, which went so good with the multi-grain rice and the salad leafs. Strongly recommend for all foodies who crave original Korean food.

★★★★★
G Google Review
Anna Elisabeth Rihlmann

It was one of the most authentic Korean restaurant that I have been to. Very delicious galbi that is thinly sliced and well marinated with smoke flavour. Mushroom soup was also very authentic, it is a dish you can't really find in other Korean restaurants. I was visiting Berlin, randomly found this place near the hotel, I hope I could visit next time 😊 Good service also!

★★★★★
G Google Review
김윤이

If you're looking for authentic and delicious Korean cuisine in Berlin, "Omagalbi" is an absolute must-try! Personally I'd recommend you 불갈비 and 들깨버섯탕!! I will definitely visit here again soon~ 🤍😊

★★★★★
G Google Review
Mandy Li

If you love Korean food like I do, this place is a must-try! Their meat is so delicious that once you try it here, you won't want to eat it anywhere else. They also have a great selection of Korean drinks — ginseng wine, Baekseju, soju, Hwayo, and more. Plus, the location is super convenient — Nollendorfplatz is served by U1, U2, U3, and U4, so getting here is really easy!

★★★★★
G Google Review
Emiya Mulzhomdao

great food, small'ish selection, but I prefer that tbh, food was fantastic, my kimchi jjigae was the perfect mix of spicy and sour. the broth of the tofu jjigae was also awesome

★★★★★
G Google Review
Lain

I had the Kimchi soup and it was incredible! The waitresses were also super kind and friendly. There are several vegan and gluten free items on the menu - the kimchi soup being one of them!

★★★★★
G Google Review
Dean Murphy

The most authentic Korean taste I have tried in Berlin so far (as a person who has lived in Seoul for the last 12 years). 진짜 진짜 맛있어요 💖 We ordered the Bul-Galbi (불갈비) and Perilla Mushroom Soup (들깨버섯탕) and it tasted just like in Korea! The meat had a smoky taste, which went so good with the multi-grain rice and the salad leafs. Strongly recommend for all foodies who crave original Korean food.

Dean Murphy

Bibimbap is amazing, much different from what you usually get in other typical Korean restaurants. The beef is incredibly well cooked.

★★★★★
G Google Review
Alexander Samarin

Generous portions, lovely staff, good food!!! Love it 💗

★★★★★
G Google Review
Patou M

Very authentic Korean restaurant with decent price! I can recommend!

★★★★★
G Google Review
taka

Food is very good and also authentisch! The bulgogi and jeyuk are very good and have a nice grill flavor to them! Service is nice and efficient. Prices are also fair considering the portions. With each dish you get sides and rice, which some Korean restaurants no longer do. Overall me and my friends all enjoyed it a lot and would go again.

★★★★★
G Google Review
M K

Incredible food - everything we ordered was so tasty and not oily! The service was very friendly and warm. Thank you very much ^_^

★★★★★
G Google Review
jane

Bibimbap is amazing, much different from what you usually get in other typical Korean restaurants. The beef is incredibly well cooked.
